desc: Debug command: Export selected (or all) levels including linked model levels to JSON.
summary: Debug command: Export selected (or all) levels including linked model levels to JSON. Captures elevations, transformed world Z, and source (host/link) for investigation.
usecase: Use when you need to run this command's workflow for the current model task.
notfor: Not for autonomous AI execution. This command requires interactive Revit UI input (dialogs, picks, or manual confirmation).
precondition: Active Revit document and required context are available.
postcondition: The command finishes with tracked success or a handled failure state.
